member.name: M:Lux.LuxBridge.ToLux(System.Object)
member.summary: Convert any C# value to a Lux-compatible value.

member.name: M:Lux.LuxBridge.FromLux``1(System.Object)
member.summary: Convert a Lux value to a C# type T.

member.name: M:Lux.LuxBridge.FromLux(System.Object,System.Type)
member.summary: Convert a Lux value to a specific C# type (with coercion).

member.name: M:Lux.LuxBridge.Wrap(System.Object)
M:Lux.LuxBridge.Register(Lux.Interpreter,System.String,System.Delegate)
M:Lux.LuxBridge.RegisterObject(Lux.Interpreter,System.String,System.Object)
M:Lux.LuxBridge.CallFunction(Lux.Interpreter,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Call a named Lux function from C# and get the raw Lux result. var raw = interp.CallFunction("onUpdate", deltaTime);

member.name: M:Lux.LuxBridge.CallFunction``1(Lux.Interpreter,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Call a named Lux function and convert the result to T. double score = interp.CallFunction<double>("getScore");

member.name: M:Lux.LuxBridge.GetGlobal``1(Lux.Interpreter,System.String)
member.summary: Read a global Lux variable and convert it to T.

member.name: M:Lux.LuxBridge.SetGlobal(Lux.Interpreter,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Write a C# value into a Lux global variable.

member.name: T:Lux.BridgeTest
member.summary: Demonstrates the C# ↔ Lux bridge API. Run with: lux --bridge-test
